theme: One conversation. That's all it takes.

linkedin.text:
One conversation. That's all it takes to know if we're the right fit.

16 years. 200+ events. 20+ countries.

But here's what I tell every potential client on our first call:

"I don't know yet if we can help you. Let me understand what you're trying to achieve. Then we'll know together."

That's not a sales tactic. That's how we've maintained a 78% repeat client rate for over a decade.

We don't push destinations. We ask about your team.
We don't push programs. We ask about your objectives.
We don't sell packages. We design experiences.

If you've been thinking about a team event for 2026 — a company trip, an incentive program, a strategic conference with an experience component — I'd genuinely like to hear about it.

No commitment. No pitch deck. 30 minutes and an honest conversation.

If we're the right fit, we'll know it. If we're not, I'll tell you that too and point you in the right direction.

That's how we've stayed in business for 16 years.

📩 alon@upe.co.il
🌐 upe.co.il
📱 Drop me a DM here on LinkedIn

Let's talk.

#CorporateEvents #IncentiveTravel #EventProduction #UproductionEvents #MICE #HRLeadership #TeamBuilding #CorporateTravel #EventPlanning #DiscoveryCall #LetsTalk
linkedin.cta: DM or visit upe.co.il to start planning
